source: Android AccDataTest; iOS raw parser uses out-of-range Data.subdata for this malformed payload

expected.sharedOwnership: Protocol-only characterization excluded from current shared parser ownership boundary because current Android/iOS behavior is platform-specific. Use this vector to make an explicit shared parser policy before promoting this behavior to common code.

notes: Android currently errors when raw type-1 ACC content does not contain a full 6-byte XYZ sample. iOS is excluded because the current parser can terminate on out-of-range Data.subdata instead of throwing a catchable error.
